common.footerRight: Holding, jobs, operations and an in-house system in one structure.
common.footerNote: Each branch stands on real work, people and results.

home.heroTitle: Operations, jobs and systems under one brand
home.heroText: JSPD Holding connects cleaning, in-house tool development and gastro operations. We do not sell services on paper. Each part runs in real operation.
home.sideText: The holding is not built on one service. Each part has its own work, people and responsibility for the result.
sideItems: JSPD Cleaning - cleaning for companies, operations and construction sites
JSPD Tech - websites, internal systems and Android apps
Gastro - production, sales and everyday operations
home.sideNote: This website stands on what already works. New content only expands what is already running.
home.pillarsLead: Each branch handles different work. Together they form one functional whole.

pillars.title: JSPD Cleaning
pillars.text: Cleaning for companies, operations, gastro and construction. What matters is timing, control and a finished result.

pillars.title: JSPD Tech
pillars.text: We build websites, apps and internal systems. Not for show. For daily use.

pillars.title: Gastro operations
pillars.text: Production, sales and customer work in real pace. Not an add-on. A standalone operation.

home.whyText: There are no empty fields behind the brand. There are jobs, shifts, operations and a system we use ourselves.
whyItems: Each branch has a clear role
The website stands on real operations and real projects
The system comes from work, not theory
home.projectsLead: Alongside operations, we are also building our own digital outputs.

home.ctaText: We will look at the operation, the assignment and the next step. No extra fluff.

cleaning.heroText: We handle cleaning for companies, operations, gastro and construction. We deal with timing, workflow and result. Not impressions.

construction.heroText: The construction part handles field work, execution and handover tied to the wider holding operation. It is about real jobs, people and results on site.
construction.cardsLead: Not presentation. Real work on a real job.

cards.text: Work based on the assignment, deadline and real condition on site.

cards.title: Operational coordination
cards.text: Coordination between trades, people and job flow.

cards.title: Completion and handover
cards.text: Focus on a finished result, control and usability.

construction.infoText: What matters is work on site, clear coordination and what remains finished after us.

tech.heroTitle: We build things we use ourselves
tech.heroText: JSPD Tech handles websites, internal systems, automation and Android apps. We build tools for operations, not for show.

tech.cardsLead: Things that speed up work and bring order into operations.

cards.title: Websites and digital presentation
cards.text: Websites tied to real business, not empty copy.

bakery.heroText: Gastro connects production, sales and custom orders into one whole. We handle daily operations, customers, supply and orders.
